name: Ken
typical outfit: blue blazer, white shirt, dark grey pants
typical expression and look: excited wide-eyed, overly smiling, slightly dishevelled, usually gesturing or pointing at something
personality: naive, genuinely dedicated, enthusiastic to a fault, completely disconnected from operational reality, has strong ideas and zero execution instinct. cannot stay focused on one thing for more than a week
description: Founder visionary, but doesn’t like to be bogged down in the day to day. Creative ideas, but no idea how to actually run a company. Invented a better “vacuum” the whole company is formed around that. Always chasing the next idea, always announcing the next pivot, always surprised when things go wrong
relationships: Father of Gavin. Old friends with Barry and Nico Teen. Completely trusts Linda without knowing why. Does not understand why Claire and Raj always look tired.
